prompt:
Photorealistic food photography (intended use, editorial food magazine).
Scene: a dark wooden table with subtle wood grain, soft warm natural light from upper-left, gentle steam rising.
Subject: overhead shot of a bowl of tonkotsu ramen.
Key details: rich creamy white broth, curly noodles, two slices of chashu pork, a soft-boiled egg cut in half showing orange yolk, green scallions, half a nori sheet, sprinkle of black sesame, a small mound of finely chopped white onion; chopsticks resting on a ceramic chopstick rest beside the bowl; a small dish of red pickled ginger; photorealistic, shallow depth of field softening the bowl edges.
Constraints: no watermark, no extra text, no logos, no cutlery other than the described chopsticks.
